name: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc.
business: Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. is a global specialty distribution company providing value-added distribution solutions to the maintenance, repair and operations (MRO), original equipment manufacturer (OEM) and industrial technology markets. It serves approximately 220,000 distinct customers in several diverse end markets supported by approximately 4,300 dedicated employees. The company operates through four reportable segments: Lawson, TestEquity, Gexpro Services and Canada Branch Division.

exposures.sentence: We are exposed to growing and evolving risks arising from the use of AI technologies by bad actors to commit fraud, misappropriate funds and facilitate cyberattacks.
TestEquity supports the aerospace and defense, wireless and communication, semiconductors, industrial electronics and automotive, and electronics manufacturing industries.
Gexpro Services serves customers in six vertical markets, including renewables, industrial power, consumer and industrial, technology, transportation, and aerospace and defense.

TestEquity continues to benefit from electronification of products across a range of industries including the internet of things (IOT), electric vehicles (EV) and the 5th generation mobile network (5G).
Gexpro Services revenue percentages by customer end markets in 2025 were as follows: Renewable energy 33%.
Lawson distributes MRO products to its customers through a network of sales representatives throughout the United States and Canada.

Cyber-attacks or other information security incidents could have a material adverse effect on our business strategy, results of operations or financial condition and subject us to additional legal costs.
TestEquity supports ... semiconductors, industrial electronics and automotive, and electronics manufacturing industries.
